args.query:
SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '#', ''), 'None', '')) as from_agent_id,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', ''), 'None', '')) as to_agent_id,
    caseid__c,
    createddate
FROM casehistory__c 
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' 
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <= '2023-04-10'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL 
    AND LENGTH(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(REPLACE(oldvalue__c, '#', ''), 'None', ''))) > 0
    AND LENGTH(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', ''), 'None', ''))) > 0;

args.query:
SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c,
    ch.createddate,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '#', ''), 'None', '')) as from_agent_id,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(REPLACE(ch.newvalue__c, '#', ''), 'None', '')) as to_agent_id
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
    AND LENGTH(TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '#', ''), 'None', ''))) > 0;

args.query:
SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c,
    ch.newvalue__c,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '#', '')) as cleaned_oldvalue,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.newvalue__c, '#', '')) as cleaned_newvalue
FROM casehistory__c ch
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate;

result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedTable) missing FROM-clause entry for table "ca"
LINE 40: HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ca.caseid__c) > 0
                               ^

[SQL: WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c,
    ch.createddate,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '#', '')) as oldvalue,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.newvalue__c, '#', '')) as newvalue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) as assignment_order
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue as from_agent,
    newvalue as to_agent,
    caseid__c
  FROM case_assignments 
  WHERE assignment_order > 1 
    AND oldvalue IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue != ''
    AND oldvalue != 'None'
    AND newvalue IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue != ''
    AND newvalue != 'None'
),
agent_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT newvalue as agent_id
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE newvalue IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue != ''
    AND newvalue != 'None'
)
SELECT 
  ac.agent_id,
  COALESCE(COUNT(t.from_agent), 0) as transfer_count
FROM agent_cases ac
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON ac.agent_id = t.from_agent
GROUP BY ac.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ca.caseid__c) > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, ac.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 10;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c,
    ch.createddate,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '#', '')) as oldvalue,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.newvalue__c, '#', '')) as newvalue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) as assignment_order
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue as from_agent,
    newvalue as to_agent,
    caseid__c
  FROM case_assignments 
  WHERE assignment_order > 1 
    AND oldvalue IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue != ''
    AND oldvalue != 'None'
    AND newvalue IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue != ''
    AND newvalue != 'None'
),
agent_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT newvalue as agent_id
  FROM case_assignments
  WHERE newvalue IS NOT NULL 
    AND newvalue != ''
    AND newvalue != 'None'
)
SELECT 
  ac.agent_id,
  COALESCE(COUNT(t.from_agent), 0) as transfer_count
FROM agent_cases ac
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON ac.agent_id = t.from_agent
GROUP BY ac.agent_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ca.caseid__c) > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, ac.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c,
    ch.createddate,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '#', '')) as oldvalue,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.newvalue__c, '#', '')) as newvalue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) as assignment_order
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue as from_agent,
    newvalue as to_agent,
    caseid__c
  FROM case_assignments 
  WHERE assignment_order > 1 
    AND oldvalue IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue != ''
    AND oldvalue != 'None'
)
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  COALESCE(transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count,
  case_count
FROM (
  SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ca.caseid__c) as case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT newvalue as agent_id, caseid__c
    FROM case_assignments 
    WHERE newvalue IS NOT NULL 
      AND newvalue != ''
      AND newvalue != 'None'
  ) ca
  GROUP BY ca.agent_id
) ac
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 
    from_agent,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY from_agent
) t ON ac.agent_id = t.from_agent
WHERE ac.case_count > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c,
    ch.createddate,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '#', '')) as oldvalue,
    TRIM(BOTH ' ' FROM REPLACE(ch.newvalue__c, '#', '')) as newvalue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ch.caseid__c ORDER BY ch.createddate) as assignment_order
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <= '2023-04-10'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT 
    oldvalue as from_agent,
    newvalue as to_agent,
    caseid__c
  FROM case_assignments 
  WHERE assignment_order > 1 
    AND oldvalue IS NOT NULL 
    AND oldvalue != ''
    AND oldvalue != 'None'
)
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  COALESCE(transfer_count, 0) as transfer_count,
  case_count
FROM (
  SELECT 
    agent_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ca.caseid__c) as case_count
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT newvalue as agent_id, caseid__c
    FROM case_assignments 
    WHERE newvalue IS NOT NULL 
      AND newvalue != ''
      AND newvalue != 'None'
  ) ca
  GROUP BY ca.agent_id
) ac
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 
    from_agent,
    COUNT(*) as transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY from_agent
) t ON ac.agent_id = t.from_agent
WHERE ac.case_count > 0
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC;
